dock_rat.name: a mangy dock rat
dock_rat.description: A large rat with matted fur, baring yellow teeth.

sewer_goblin.name: a sewer goblin
sewer_goblin.description: A scrawny goblin clutching a rusty blade, eyes darting nervously.

goblin_brute.name: a hulking goblin brute
goblin_brute.description: A scarred goblin twice the size of its kin, wielding a crude club.

grey_wolf.name: a grey wolf
grey_wolf.description: A lean wolf with hungry eyes, hackles raised.

bandit.name: a road bandit
bandit.description: A rough-looking bandit in mismatched leather armor.

bandit_leader.name: the bandit leader
bandit_leader.description: A grizzled bandit captain with a wicked-looking falchion.

garden_serpent.name: a garden serpent
garden_serpent.description: A jewel-scaled snake coiled in the hedges, more territorial than venomous.

renegade_guard.name: a renegade keep guard
renegade_guard.description: A guard in Concord colors whose loyalty has plainly been bought by someone else.

bilge_rat.name: a bilge rat
bilge_rat.description: A fat, slow rat that's clearly never gone hungry in this ship's hold.

press_gang_thug.name: a press-gang thug
press_gang_thug.description: A broad-shouldered tough with a cudgel, sizing up passersby for a ship that's short on crew.

undertow_cutthroat.name: an undertow cutthroat
undertow_cutthroat.description: A wiry knife-fighter with a wave-and-coin tattoo on one forearm.

undertow_enforcer.name: an undertow enforcer
undertow_enforcer.description: A scarred bruiser who keeps the syndicate's debts collected, by whatever means needed.

cave_rat.name: a cave rat
cave_rat.description: Pale and half-blind from a life lived underground.

blind_eel.name: a blind eel
blind_eel.description: A long, pale shape that whips out of the dark water before you fully see it.

vael_wretch.name: a vael wretch
vael_wretch.description: Something that was once a person, bloated and waterlogged, shambling on bone-white legs.

drowned_cultist.name: a drowned cultist
drowned_cultist.description: A robed figure chanting to a god that drowned along with everyone else here.

cult_zealot.name: a vael cult zealot
cult_zealot.description: A wild-eyed believer clutching a tide idol, certain Old Vael will rise in their lifetime.

archive_construct.name: an archive construct
archive_construct.description: A coral-and-bronze guardian, still patiently warding a library no one living can read.

the_tidewarden.name: the tidewarden
the_tidewarden.description: A towering, coral-fused construct, ancient and patient, the last thing standing between Saltspire and Old Vael's deepest vault.

graveyard_rat.name: a graveyard rat
graveyard_rat.description: A rat grown fat and bold on offerings left for the dead.

restless_spirit.name: a restless spirit
restless_spirit.description: A cold, half-seen shape that drifts between the headstones, unwilling or unable to move on.

skeletal_sentry.name: a skeletal sentry
skeletal_sentry.description: Old bones in older armor, still standing the post it died at.

ghoul.name: a ghoul
ghoul.description: A hunched, grave-pale thing with too many teeth, dragging itself between the mausoleums.

crypt_wight.name: a crypt wight
crypt_wight.description: A withered guardian bound to the sealed crypt long before the Concord ever existed.

the_bone_warden.name: the bone warden
the_bone_warden.description: An armored colossus of fused bone and rusted iron, raised to guard the crypt's last secret forever.

cave_crab.name: a cave crab
cave_crab.description: A crab the size of a hound, claws scraping loudly against the sea-cave stone.

will_o_wisp.name: a will-o-wisp
will_o_wisp.description: A cold, drifting light that lures the unwary off the safe path through the moor.

fallen_marauder.name: a fallen marauder
fallen_marauder.description: A rotted remnant of the Red Tide fleet, still fighting a battle that ended two centuries ago.

bog_leech.name: a bog leech
bog_leech.description: A leech the length of a forearm, surfacing silently from the mire.

moor_wraith.name: a moor wraith
moor_wraith.description: A tall, hollow shape that walks the hollow moor at the edge of sight, never quite approaching directly.

tower_brigand.name: a tower brigand
tower_brigand.description: A squatter living in the ruined watchtower, armed and unwelcoming of company.

undertow_smuggler.name: an undertow smuggler
undertow_smuggler.description: A rope-scarred sailor moving crates through the sea cave, well past the harbormaster's notice.

mire_kin.name: a mire-kin
mire_kin.description: A lean, gray-skinned fenwalker, more at home in the muck than any road.

swamp_stalker.name: a swamp stalker
swamp_stalker.description: A lurking, long-limbed predator that the mire-kin themselves are wary of.

red_tide_captain.name: the red tide captain
red_tide_captain.description: The drowned captain of the fleet that broke itself on Saltspire's founders, still standing his ground at the salt fields.

fen_mother.name: the fen mother
fen_mother.description: An ancient hag who has ruled the fenmire since long before Saltspire had a name.

ashwing_drake.name: the ashwing drake
ashwing_drake.description: A young drake, ash-scaled and watchful, that's claimed the mountain pass as its own -- a sign of larger, wilder country beyond Saltspire's reach.
